use_cases: Displaying collections of external documentation or resource links
Creating a navigable grid of tools, references, or external services
Showcasing resource hubs with icons and update timestamps
Organizing and presenting external links in a scannable card layout
ai_summary: A responsive grid component that displays resource cards with icons, titles, and external links. Features staggered entrance animations via Framer Motion and subtle hover scale effects. Uses shadcn/ui design tokens for theming and includes shadow transitions on hover states. Suitable for organizing documentation links, tool collections, or resource hubs.
